Demonstrates app launch reasons with wakeup feature, metadata, and build script for Pebble.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Demonstrates handling and displaying app launch reasons with a wakeup feature on Pebble.

## Files
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "Launch Reason Demo" app, including UUID, version, and target platforms.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options for app and worker binaries.
